# J-SET SHOPPING

A peer-to-peer online marketplace where individuals can post items for sale and purchase goods from other users. The platform focuses on enabling community-driven commerce, similar to a classifieds or second-hand marketplace.

Source: https://j-set-shopping-82b6e9fb.zappy5.app

---

## Turn Clutter Into Cash Like Selling on Facebook Marketplace — J-SET SHOPPING

URL: https://j-set-shopping-82b6e9fb.zappy5.app
Description: List items for sale and discover unbeatable local deals on our peer-to-peer marketplace. Skip the mercari selling fee and start your own community-driven shop today!

Turn Clutter Into Cash Like Selling on Facebook Marketplace — J-SET SHOPPING

Why J-SET SHOPPING


## Built for the community, designed for trust.


Experience a marketplace where posting your items for sale on facebook marketplace feels effortless, and discovering your next treasure is always exciting.









### Easy Item Posting


List your items in seconds with our streamlined posting flow. Whether you're selling on facebook marketplace or listing directly on J-SET, our intuitive tools make it simple to upload photos, set prices, and reach buyers instantly.








### Community-Driven Buying


Connect directly with sellers in your area. Browse items for sale on facebook marketplace near me or explore local listings. Our peer-to-peer model builds relationships, not just transactions.








### Safe & Trustworthy Marketplace


Your safety is our priority. We provide secure messaging, verified profiles, and transparent ratings—so you can buy and sell with confidence every time.








### Broad Category Discovery


From electronics to fashion, home goods to collectibles—discover everyday goods across dozens of categories. Finding exactly what you need has never been more enjoyable.















## Discover what your neighbors are selling on facebook marketplace and beyond.


J-SET SHOPPING transforms everyday second-hand into a premium discovery experience. From curated household gems to fashion finds and electronics, every listing tells a story. Skip the noise of my ebay selling dashboards — browse, connect, and trade directly with real people in your community.


Start Exploring
Sell an Item












Trusted Community Sellers































## Trusted by ourcommunity










### The Savvy Seller


“J-SET made selling on facebook marketplace feel effortless. I cleared out my closet and made real money in a weekend. The community is so responsive!”











### The Bargain Hunter


“I find incredible items for sale on facebook marketplace near me every single day. Snagged a designer lamp for a fraction of retail. This is my go-to for unique finds.”











### The Conscious Shopper


“Buying second-hand through J-SET is my way of staying sustainable. It’s like my ebay selling experience but more personal and community-focused.”

















## Ready to turn your clutter into cash?


Join thousands of trusted buyers and sellers on J-SET SHOPPING. Whether you're decluttering your home or hunting for unique finds, our community marketplace makes buying and selling feel safe, fast, and effortless. Start posting your items today and discover what your neighbors are offering.



Start Selling Now

## Post, Sell &amp; Earn: Easier Than My eBay Selling — J-SET SHOPPING

URL: https://j-set-shopping-82b6e9fb.zappy5.app/how-it-works
Description: See how simple peer-to-peer selling can be. From listing your first item to making a sale, our step-by-step guide shows you how to keep more profit with zero mercari selling fee surprises.

Post, Sell & Earn: Easier Than My eBay Selling — J-SET SHOPPING













































Skip to main content














- Products Products




- Home
- How It Works
- Community & Trust
- Contact
0












Products












How It Works

## Your marketplace journey, made simple


J-SET SHOPPING turns everyday selling into a seamless community experience. Post your items, connect with real buyers nearby, and complete exchanges safely — all in three straightforward steps.






01


### Post your item


List anything you want to sell in minutes. Add photos, set your price, and publish to the community marketplace — whether it's furniture, electronics, or clothing, your listing reaches interested buyers instantly.









02


### Connect with buyers


Interested buyers reach out directly through the platform. Chat, answer questions, and negotiate — similar to selling on Facebook Marketplace but with a dedicated, secure environment built for peer-to-peer trust.









03


### Complete the exchange


Arrange a safe meetup or delivery and finalize the sale. With no hidden selling fees and community-driven ratings, every transaction is transparent, straightforward, and rewarding for both sides.


















## Create a Listing That Sells


Good presentation isn't just about looking nice — it's about building trust and helping buyers see the real value of your items. Follow these steps to stand out, attract serious interest, and close the deal faster.






1



### Prepare & Capture


Clean your item thoroughly and find a well-lit, uncluttered space. Use natural light and multiple angles to show every detail — buyers on J-SET SHOPPING want to see exactly what they're getting before they reach out.







2



### Describe With Honesty


Write a clear, accurate description that includes brand, condition, dimensions, and any flaws. Transparent listings get more views and fewer returns — similar to best practices for selling on Facebook Marketplace and other peer-to-peer platforms.







3



### Price & Publish Confidently


Set a fair, competitive price based on similar listings. Our platform helps you reach nearby buyers looking for items for sale on Facebook Marketplace near me, without the extra fees you'd find on Mercari selling or My eBay selling experiences.


























## Why J-SET Shopping Works for Everyone


Whether you're clearing out your closet, hunting for a rare find, or simply want to give items a second life, our marketplace creates value for sellers, buyers, and the planet alike.











### Earn Money from Your Unused Items


Turn clutter into cash with zero upfront listing fees. Post your items in seconds and reach a community of local buyers actively searching for what you're selling — similar to the ease of selling on Facebook Marketplace, but with more control and fewer distractions.









### Discover Unique Finds at Great Prices


Skip the big-box retail markups. Browse curated local listings for one-of-a-kind items, vintage treasures, and everyday essentials. Every purchase supports a real person, not a faceless corporation, making every transaction feel more meaningful.









### Strengthen Your Local Community


Every transaction on J-SET Shopping keeps valuable goods out of landfills and money circulating within your neighborhood. By choosing pre-owned, you're actively participating in circular commerce — reducing waste and building connections with the people around you.










BEST PRACTICES


## Sell smarter, stay safer —community guidelines


A few simple habits make every transaction smoother. Follow these four principles to build trust, attract serious buyers, and keep our marketplace friendly for everyone.









### Clear, honest descriptions


List every detail that matters — size, brand, condition, and any flaws. When you describe an item exactly as it is, buyers feel confident and returns drop. Think of your listing as the first handshake.








### Real condition notes


Use the condition scale honestly. Upload well-lit photos from multiple angles and show any wear up close. Buyers browsing items for sale on Facebook Marketplace near you will appreciate the transparency.








### Respectful communication


Reply promptly and politely. Agree on price, pickup location, and payment method before meeting. Clear chat threads keep both sides comfortable — whether you are selling on Facebook Marketplace or right here on J-SET.








### Community-safe exchanges


Meet in public, daylight spots whenever possible. Use secure in-app messaging and never share personal banking details. A safe transaction protects both you and the community — just like the best My eBay selling habits.













The trusted marketplace where community meets commerce. Buy, sell, and connect with confidence.

## Community-Driven Commerce, Redefined.


J-SET SHOPPING isn't just another marketplace—it's a trusted ecosystem where neighbors connect, sell what they no longer need, and discover incredible value right in their own community. We believe that buying and selling should feel safe, personal, and empowering.











### Built on Trust & Transparency


Every transaction on J-SET SHOPPING is anchored in verified profiles, secure messaging, and a community-driven review system. We've designed the platform so you can buy and sell with complete peace of mind—just like trading with a trusted neighbor.


- Verified local profiles

- Secure in-app messaging

- Community-powered reviews










### Sustainable & Smart Spending


Give pre-loved items a second life while keeping more cash in your pocket. J-SET SHOPPING makes it effortless to find quality goods at a fraction of retail price, reducing waste and championing a smarter, circular economy for everyone.


- Reduce environmental waste

- Save up to 70% vs. retail

- Circular economy champion












15,000+

### Active Community Members


A growing network of trusted buyers and sellers connecting daily, making peer-to-peer commerce feel like your neighborhood marketplace.




87%

### Repeat User Confidence


The majority of our users return to buy and sell again, proving the reliability and ease of use that keeps the community thriving.




1,200+

### Diverse Product Categories


From electronics to fashion, furniture to collectibles — find exactly what you need or sell what you no longer use in a vast, organized marketplace.




42 Tonnes

### Reuse & Sustainability Impact


Together we’ve kept over 42 tonnes of goods out of landfills this year, giving pre-loved items a second life and reducing waste.
















## Real stories from our community


Every item has a story. Here are a few from people who sell, buy, and keep things moving on J-SET SHOPPING — including those who started selling on facebook marketplace and found a new home here.



















“I listed my old film camera on a whim, thinking no one would want it. Within two days, a photography student messaged me — she was so excited to give it a second life. The whole process felt safe and incredibly easy.”



Morgan L.
Sold 12 items



















“I've been hunting for this limited-edition console for years. Finding it on J-SET at a fair price was incredible. The seller even included a handwritten note. It felt like a transaction between friends, not strangers.”



David C.
Bought 8 items



















“We just moved in together and needed to furnish our kitchen on a budget. J-SET helped us find beautiful, gently used items that fit our style perfectly. It's our go-to before buying anything new now.”



Jamie & Taylor K.
Bought & Sold 20 items






Read more community stories →








## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about buying, selling, and staying safe on J-SET SHOPPING. If you're used to selling on facebook marketplace or managing my ebay selling account, you'll feel right at home here — with even more community support.






### How do I post an item for sale?


Creating a listing is simple. Click the "Sell" button in your dashboard, upload clear photos of your item, write a detailed description, and set your price. Once you publish, your listing goes live instantly for thousands of potential buyers in your community to discover.





### Is there a selling fee on J-SET SHOPPING?


We believe in keeping more money in your pocket. Unlike the mercari selling fee structure or other platforms, J-SET SHOPPING charges a flat, transparent 5% transaction fee only when your item sells. There are no listing fees, no subscription costs, and no hidden charges — you keep 95% of what you earn.





### How do I connect with a buyer or seller?


Our built-in messaging system lets you chat directly with other users without sharing personal contact information. You can discuss item details, negotiate prices, and arrange pickup or delivery — all within a secure, monitored environment that protects your privacy.






### Can I see items for sale near me?


Absolutely. When you browse items for sale on facebook marketplace near me, you expect local results. J-SET SHOPPING uses your location to show you listings from sellers in your area first. You can also adjust your search radius or browse nationwide — the choice is yours.





### How does J-SET SHOPPING keep transactions safe?


Trust is our foundation. Every user goes through identity verification, and our secure payment system holds funds until the buyer confirms receipt of the item. We also offer a resolution center for any disputes, and our community review system helps you make informed decisions before you buy or sell.





### What can I sell on J-SET SHOPPING?


You can sell almost anything — from electronics and fashion to furniture, vehicles, and collectibles. We have dedicated categories for every type of item. Just make sure your listings follow our community guidelines, which prohibit counterfeit goods, illegal items, and anything that doesn't belong in a trusted marketplace.














The trusted marketplace where community meets commerce. Buy, sell, and connect with confidence.

## We're Here to Help


Whether you're buying, selling, or just exploring the J-SET community, find the right support path below.








### General Questions


Need help with your account, listings, or just want to understand how J-SET works? We've got answers.







### Seller Support


Get dedicated assistance with posting items for sale, managing your listings, and reaching buyers faster on the marketplace.







### Community & Partnerships


Interested in collaborating, promoting your brand, or growing the J-SET community? Let's build something together.

### We're listening


Whether you have a question about listing an item for sale on Facebook Marketplace-style boards, need help with your account, or want to learn more about our selling fees, drop us a line.




We typically reply within 24 hours



Your information is kept private and secure



Dedicated support for buyers and sellers















## Where J‑SET Shopping Works for You


Peer‑to‑peer marketplace access built for your community — no storefront required.








### Online Marketplace Access


Post items for sale and browse listings from anywhere. Our platform connects you to buyers and sellers across the region, making selling on facebook marketplace and similar channels seamless.







### Local Community Focus


Discover items for sale on facebook marketplace near me and connect with people in your area. Every listing is designed to foster trust and safe, local exchanges.







### Flexible Support & Communication


Whether you're managing my ebay selling or tracking a mercari selling fee, our support team is here to help. Reach out anytime for guidance on your listings and transactions.













## Ready to Start Your Journey?


Whether you're looking to sell items collecting dust or hunting for your next great find, the J-SET SHOPPING community is waiting for you. Join the marketplace built for real people, real deals, and real connections.

## Return Policy

URL: https://j-set-shopping-82b6e9fb.zappy5.app/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - J-SET SHOPPING

































































- Products Products




- Home
- How It Works
- Community & Trust
- Contact
0











Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/9/2026



At J-SET SHOPPING, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://j-set-shopping-82b6e9fb.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy






























- Products Products




- Home
- How It Works
- Community & Trust
- Contact
0














# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/9/2026



J-SET SHOPPING ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: J-SET SHOPPING

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://j-set-shopping-82b6e9fb.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement






























- Products Products




- Home
- How It Works
- Community & Trust

0














# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 9, 2026



J-SET SHOPPING is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: J-SET SHOPPING

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.














The trusted marketplace where community meets commerce. Buy, sell, and connect with confidence.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 9, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - J-SET SHOPPING

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - E-commerce / Marketplace provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


J-SET SHOPPING provides E-commerce / Marketplace through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by J-SET SHOPPING. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: J-SET SHOPPING

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
